international.title: InCTF
international.summary: Successfully tackled diverse challenges in the fields of web exploitation, reverse engineering, and cryptography. Amidst the multitude of competing teams, only a select few were privileged to advance to the world finals.

national.title: Smart India Hackathon
national.summary: Engineered an intelligent retail inventory stock prediction system employing cutting-edge image recognition technology and advanced machine learning algorithms. This entire system was meticulously designed for portability, seamlessly integrated with a Raspberry Pi for optimal performance. Received a cash prize of RS 100,000

national.title: Smart India Hackathon
national.summary: Crafted an innovative medical dispensing system, intelligently delivering precise doses of prescribed medications. Adhering to rigorous industry design standards, we engineered a refined product that harnessed an array of intricate circuits to ensure the accurate dispensation of medications. Received a cash prize of RS 50,000

university.title: Technical Star of The Batch
university.summary: Honored with the prestigious 'Technical Star of the Batch' accolade, accompanied by a noteworthy cash prize of RS 50,000, in recognition of exceptional technical accomplishments.

university.title: Vice-president
university.summary: Held the esteemed role of Vice President within the Computer Science and Engineering department. During my tenure, I orchestrated enhanced participation from our batch in hackathons, capture the flag competitions, and online coding contests. Additionally, I played a pivotal role in organizing large-scale technical events that significantly enriched and uplifted our department

university.title: Super60
university.summary: Embarked on a 12-week empowering leadership training program has enabled me to ignite my inner potential and discover the true leader within. Super 60 is a transformative opportunity that allows me to introspect, grow, and unveil the best version of myself.
